bullets.title: S-Tier IP Portfolio Ownership:
bullets.text: Directed high-end CG and animation production for the world's most valuable gaming franchises, including League of Legends (Riot Games), DNF (Tencent), Honor of Kings, and miHoYo’s Genshin Impact / ZZZ.

bullets.title: What/Client:
bullets.text: Independent Feature Film (Co-production: China, France, Denmark, Qatar) / Budget: ~$2.5M USD.

bullets.title: Why & How:
bullets.text: Required bridging extreme gaps between Chinese independent filmmaking constraints and rigorous European funding/auditing standards. Achieved through relentless global pitching, cross-cultural legal negotiations, and hands-on technical supervision.

bullets.title: Scope:
bullets.text: Managed a multi-national crew and post-production labs across 3 continents, dealing with multi-currency budgets (RMB, EUR, DKK, USD).

bullets.title: Ownership:
bullets.text: Drove the entire financing plan, government censorship clearance, international legal delivery, and technical mastering.

bullets.title: Business Impact:
bullets.text: Made history as the first Chinese directorial debut since 2006 to be dual-selected for the Sundance Film Festival (World Cinema Dramatic Competition) and Berlinale (Panorama). Successfully secured global distribution. **Project 2: Tencent "Dungeon & Fighter" (DNF) & "Honor of Kings" CG Campaigns**

bullets.title: What/Client:
bullets.text: High-end CG character trailers and promotional animations for Tencent IEG (TiMi/Morefun Studios).

bullets.title: Why & How:
bullets.text: The client required hyper-stylized, action-heavy 3D animations within brutal turnaround times. Managed expectations by acting as a buffer between Tencent's strict IP requirements and international animation vendors.

bullets.title: Scope:
bullets.text: Managed budgets over 1M+ RMB per asset, coordinating dozens of remote artists, animators, and sound designers. 500K USD in total

bullets.title: Ownership:
bullets.text: Lead Executive Producer. Drove the pitch, locked the SOW, supervised the daily WIP reviews (via Monday.com/SyncSketch), and ensured bilingual script/VO accuracy.

bullets.title: Business Impact:
bullets.text: Delivered top-tier visual assets that resonated with millions of players, securing Final Frontier’s position as a preferred vendor in Tencent’s highly competitive global procurement pool. **Project 3: Nike 618 & Dragon Campaigns (via AKQA)**

bullets.title: Scope:
bullets.text: Fast-turnaround digital assets, KV mocks, and 30s animations leveraging global Nike toolkits.

bullets.title: Ownership:
bullets.text: Led budget negotiations, resource allocation, and direct communication with AKQA creatives to align on visual tone and deliverables.

bullets.title: Business Impact:
bullets.text: Successfully delivered high-energy, culturally relevant assets for Nike's crucial China e-commerce festivals, maintaining margins despite agency pressure.
